c74object.name: multi_track
c74object.digest: Multi-track audio source separation via neural network Python server
c74object.description: Sends audio data to a Python server over OSC for neural network inference, separating audio into four instrument stems: bass, drums, guitar, and piano. Communicates via OSC on configurable UDP ports.

outlet.digest: Bass — outputs index/value pairs of bass audio data
Drums — outputs index/value pairs of drums audio data
Guitar — outputs index/value pairs of guitar audio data
Piano — outputs index/value pairs of piano audio data

method.name: jit_matrix
method.digest: Send a Jitter matrix to the Python server for processing
method.description: Accepts a float32 Jitter matrix with 4 planes (one per instrument: bass, drums, guitar, piano) and sends it to the Python server for source separation inference.

method.name: server
method.digest: Start or stop the Python server
method.description: Send server 1 to launch the Python server using the command set via set_command. The external will automatically send load_model once the server reports ready. Send server 0 to stop the server.

method.name: set_command
method.digest: Set the shell command used to launch the Python server

method.name: load_model
method.digest: Manually send the load model command to the Python server

method.name: predict
method.digest: Manually trigger a prediction on the Python server

method.name: verbose
method.digest: Enable or disable verbose logging and timing output
method.description: When enabled (1), prints data import time, round-trip processing time, packet test times, and network throughput to the Max console.

method.name: packet_size
method.digest: Set the OSC packet size in floats (128 – 16384, default: 10240)

method.name: predict_instruments
method.digest: Tell the Python server which instruments to run inference on (1 = yes, 0 = no)
method.description: Send a list of four 0s and 1s — one per instrument in order: bass drums guitar piano. 1 means run inference for that instrument, 0 means skip it. Example: predict_instruments 1 1 0 0 runs inference for bass and drums only. The selection is sent to the Python server over OSC.

method.name: read_instruments
method.digest: Select which planes of the input Jitter matrix to read (1 = yes, 0 = no)
method.description: Send a list of four 0s and 1s — one per instrument in order: bass drums guitar piano. 1 means read that instrument's plane from the input Jitter matrix, 0 means skip it. Example: read_instruments 1 1 0 0 reads only the bass and drums planes.

method.name: test_packet
method.digest: Send a test OSC packet and measure round-trip time

method.name: print
method.digest: Send a print command to the Python server

method.name: get_client_ip
method.digest: Fetch and display the client's public IP address

entry.name: Network Configuration
entry.description: Default ports: sender 7000, listener 8000. The server IP is set via the --server_ip flag in set_command. The client IP is auto-detected via api.ipify.org.

entry.name: Python Server Protocol
entry.description: The server must send /ready true when ready, and /server_predicted true when processing is complete. Audio results are returned as OSC messages on /bass, /drums, /guitar, /piano with index and float array data.

attribute.name: verb
attribute.digest: Enable or disable verbose logging (0 = off, 1 = on)
attribute.description: When set to 1, prints timing and data flow information to the Max console, including data import time, round-trip processing time, and network throughput. Same as sending the verbose message.
